requirementGroup.label: 50 credits of Arts and Humanities
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: PLEASE NOTE: The University of Washington requires a minimum of 50 credits for all majors. Students who test out of Slavic Department language requirements MUST STILL complete 50 credits appropriate to the Eastern European Languages, Literature, and Culture major , and should select alternate courses with the assistance of an adviser in the Humanities Academic Services Center .

requirementGroups.label: 50 credits of Arts and Humanities
requirementGroups.sourceHeading: PLEASE NOTE: The University of Washington requires a minimum of 50 credits for all majors. Students who test out of Slavic Department language requirements MUST STILL complete 50 credits appropriate to the Russian Language, Literature, and Culture major , and should select alternate courses with the assistance of an adviser in the Humanities Academic Services Center .
